params.disputeWindowSeconds: 0 = use default (48h). Must be within MIN/MAX bounds.

params.sellerBps: Basis points for seller (0–10000). 10000 = 100% to seller, 0 = full refund.

remainingAmount(uint256).notice: Remaining funds locked for this job (after milestone payouts)

resolveDispute(uint256,uint256).notice: Arbiter resolves dispute with partial split.
